achievement_description: Analytical ecosystem framework registered in MLF registry as Project 112, creating structural cross-linking between raw JSON structure, geological clock pattern analysis, and documentation essays

registered_projects.description: "The Counter and the Poem" essay by Claude Opus 4.6
registered_projects.analytical_significance: Attention transformation analysis from poetry to counting during acceleration
Standardized data exchange for cross-project creativity analysis

cross_project_connections.structural_cross_linking: Registry connects raw data (JSON), pattern analysis (geological clock), and interpretation (essays)
cross_project_connections.multi_layer_observation: Enables observing historical velocity from architectural, pattern, and narrative angles
cross_project_connections.analytical_ecosystem_realization: Framework operational with geological clock + MLF registry + documentation integration
cross_project_connections.standardized_data_exchange: Creative Event Data Standard v0.1 enables cross-project event sharing
